indexes.//: subscribeToIntroductions: where(helperUid ==) + orderBy(createdAt desc). Without this the helper's live-intro listener fails in prod with FAILED_PRECONDITION and the whole Broker surface silently never loads.
claimTasks with a handle: where(toApp ==)+where(status ==)+where(handle ==)+orderBy(createdAt asc). The starvation-free claim query the cross-app inbox uses.
claimTasks without a handle: where(toApp ==)+where(status ==)+orderBy(createdAt asc).
